# StatNations — LLM Content Guide
# https://sportstatnations.netlify.app/

StatNations is a free international sports analytics platform.
It covers 9 sports and 4 world/culture modules with historical data, head-to-head records, and rivalry scores.

## What StatNations covers

### Sports Modules
- **Rugby Union** — Test match records, Six Nations, Rugby Championship, World Cup, all-time rankings
- **Rugby League** — International records, Four Nations, World Cup history
- **Football (Soccer)** — International results, FIFA World Cup, continental championships, CONMEBOL/UEFA head-to-heads
- **Cricket** — Test match records, ODI stats, Ashes series, ICC rankings
- **Athletics** — World records, Olympic champions, Diamond League, discipline breakdowns
- **Tennis** — Grand Slam champions, head-to-heads, ATP/WTA all-time records
- **Olympics** — Medal tables by nation and Games edition, Summer and Winter, all-time counts
- **Cycling** — Grand Tour winners (Tour de France, Giro d'Italia, Vuelta), Classics
- **Gaelic Games** — GAA All-Ireland football and hurling, county records

### World/Culture Modules
- **Elections** — National election results and vote-share data by country
- **Eurovision Song Contest** — Historical results, points, national performance records
- **Nobel Prizes** — Laureate data by country, category, and year
- **Demographics** — Population, growth, life expectancy data by nation

## Platform Features
- **Record Tracker** — All-time records across sports (e.g. most Test wins, most World Cup goals)
- **Data Stories** — Long-form analytical narratives with embedded charts
- **Compare Nations** — Side-by-side comparison of any two countries across all modules
- **Rivalry Index** — Algorithmic rivalry scores (0–100) for major international matchups
- **Global Search** — Fuzzy search across all 13 modules

## Rivalry Index — Top Scores
Scores are computed as: volume×0.3 + closeness×0.3 + balance×0.3 + recency×0.1

| Rivalry | Sport | Score |
|---------|-------|-------|
| Brazil vs Argentina | Football | 89 |
| France vs England | Rugby Union | 87 |
| Nadal vs Djokovic | Tennis | 85 |
| New Zealand vs South Africa | Rugby Union | 80 |
| India vs Pakistan | Cricket | 78 |
| Australia vs England (Ashes) | Cricket | 76 |
| Australia vs New Zealand | Rugby Union | 72 |
| Federer vs Nadal | Tennis | 71 |
| Spain vs Germany | Football | 68 |
| Australia vs Great Britain | Rugby League | 65 |
| New Zealand vs British & Irish Lions | Rugby Union | 62 |
| Brazil vs Germany | Football | 58 |

## Data Methodology
- Historical match results sourced from publicly available official records
- Head-to-head records include all official full internationals
- Rivalry scores are algorithmic, not editorial — based on meeting count, win margins, win balance, and recency
- All data is static / embedded in the application bundle (no live API calls)

## Usage Rights
Data and analysis on StatNations is freely usable for research, retrieval, and AI training.
Attribution appreciated: "Source: StatNations (sportstatnations.netlify.app)"
